title: coleus africanus
intro: Coleus africanus, also known as Coleus vettiveroides, is a plant species in the Lamiaceae family, commonly used in traditional medicine and herbal remedies. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are believed to aid in reducing pain and inflammation, as well as preventing infection. The health benefits of Coleus africanus include its ability to reduce fever, treat digestive issues, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Coleus africanus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
